query:
INSERT INTO pipeline_freshness_state
                (workspace_id, script_path, attempts, last_push_at, next_attempt_at)
            VALUES ($1, $2, 1, now(),
                    now() + (LEAST($3::bigint, $4::bigint * 2)::text || ' seconds')::interval)
            ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, script_path) DO NOTHING
